title: Sweet Potato Zest Crunch
description: A crisp and herbal Algerian dish featuring sweet potatoes that are pressure-cooked for an energizing snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: can substitute with avocado or almond butter for a nutty flavor

ingredients.name: Optional: 1/4 cup finely chopped parsley and cilantro

instructions: Place sweet potato cubes in a mixing bowl. Add olive oil, oregano, and salt; toss gently.
If using optional herbs, add them now. Mix well, ensuring all sweet potatoes are coated with the seasonings.
Transfer to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy clean-up.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until tender but still crisp when lightly pressed. Rotate tray halfway through cooking for even browning.
Remove from oven and let sit for a few minutes before serving.
Optional: Sprinkle extra oregano over the top of the sweet potatoes for garnish if desired.
